rationale.org-governance: Novelty: ANN-ISM maturity model assessing org-level security practice maturity
rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Original 14-risk vulnerability taxonomy for AI-generated code, empirically weighted
rationale.expert-validated: 19-expert Delphi rounds plus 7-faculty structured pilot review of framework
rationale.built-system: ANN implemented/trained; framework operationalized and run at real company
rationale.metrics: Defines maturity scores and thresholds; measurand: security
rationale.steering: Practice catalog substantively includes adversarial training, secure templates, fine-tuning
rationale.risk-security: Focal analysis: mitigation framework contributed and evaluated
rationale.risk-quality: CR2 quality/logic errors empirically rated; mitigation maturity assessed
rationale.risk-overreliance: CR11 over-reliance empirically rated; HITL/XAI maturity assessed
rationale.method-self-report: Questionnaire survey plus expert panel judgments produce evidence
rationale.method-field-study: Case study at AI code-generation company as field evaluation
